title: Leaf's Variants - An Isle Of Berk Addon
description: Isle Of Berk QOL Items and 200+ new variants!
body:
🐉 **LeafsVariants** Expanding the Skies of Berk

**LeafsVariants** is a content-rich expansion addon for the Isle of Berk mod, built to deepen the dragon ecosystem with seamless visual variety and thoughtful quality-of-life improvements. Designed for survival playthroughs and multiplayer servers, this addon enhances immersion without disrupting balance.

## Please do NOT steal my assets and use it for your own personal gain in your mod, if you see someone using my assets please report it to me via Discord: Leafmutt
## 
## that said, i have given ZERO permission to ANYBODY to use my assets for their own mod, and you will recieve a take down.

**🌿 Dragon Variant Expansion**

250+ brand-new dragon variants for Isle of Berk Dragons and Archipelago Additions

Carefully designed to blend naturally with existing dragons

Makes every wild encounter and tamed dragon feel unique and alive!

![Fallfest](https://c10.patreonusercontent.com/4/patreon-media/p/post/148039529/3af8bb95325a4162bc6d7f7ba8d7eeaa/eyJhIjoxLCJ3Ijo4MjB9/1.png?token-hash=TkVJ7Dyyba7yz3NKr-y8WpXCgJYiWNyGUtt9xKqk3c4%3D&token-time=1769644800)

**⚙️ Quality of Life Features**

These additions improve dragon management while respecting progression and server balance:

Permanent Baby Item
Keep dragons in their baby form forever — perfect for collections, builds, or roleplay.

Dragon Documents
Displays a dragon’s original tamer, enabling clear ownership tracking on multiplayer servers.

Dragon Scents
Adds a controlled breeding cooldown system to prevent overbreeding and maintain balance.

Dragon Growth Serum
Accelerates baby dragon growth while keeping progression fair and rewarding.

![Variant](https://c10.patreonusercontent.com/4/patreon-media/p/post/147390094/4d20753ef3c948f388d315b2536703b1/eyJ3IjoxMDgwfQ%3D%3D/1.png?token-hash=MrhAAxetLb6O7KFtBYOG8TiXBMyDKw8omSAoBd5S9gY%3D&token-time=1769644800)

**🔧 Requirements**

Isle of Berk Dragons

Archipelago Additions

iobvariantloader

**📖 Documentation**

Full item breakdowns, mechanics, and setup guides are available on the official wiki:

**👉 LeafsVariants Wiki**
[https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PeCcpnJxAyQ4GUV-4ufnWFWvh5o9TMt4DUx6BqIWt8w/edit?usp=sharing](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1PeCcpnJxAyQ4GUV-4ufnWFWvh5o9TMt4DUx6BqIWt8w/edit?usp=sharing)
